headline: Fastenal to Break Ground on New Southeast U.S. Distribution Facility
summary: WINONA, Minn. & ATLANTA, March 13, 2026--Fastenal Company (NASDAQ: FAST) has announced it will begin construction of a new Southeast U.S. regional operations and logistics center in Carrollton, Georgia. The groundbreaking ceremony will take place on Tuesday, March 24th at 2:30 p.m. ET at the Old Airport Road Development.
